summary: Bootstrap admin email matching now treats missing email_verified as unknown instead of false, while still blocking explicit email_verified=false in both acquisition-api and webspa-admin.

acceptance_results.criterion: A configured bootstrap email with no email_verified claim receives platform scope and selected tenant context.
acceptance_results.reason: Claims now preserve whether email_verified was present, and admin bootstrap only blocks explicit false.

acceptance_results.criterion: A configured bootstrap email with email_verified=false remains unscoped.
acceptance_results.reason: Explicit false is still treated as unverified by backend and frontend tests.

acceptance_results.criterion: The admin SPA maps configured bootstrap emails without email_verified to configured tenant workspaces.
acceptance_results.reason: resolveOptionalEmailVerified treats missing email_verified as allowed and explicit false as blocked.

cleanup_notes: Live acquisition-api was rebuilt and restarted on port 8084.
Live runtime was launched with ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_PLATFORM_EMAILS aligned to the web admin development bootstrap.
npm ci hydrated frontend/webspa-admin/node_modules for verification only; package manifests were unchanged.
completed_work: Created TMP-058 defect slice and work order.
Tracked email_verified claim presence through Auth0 claims and tenant identity.
Allowed backend bootstrap platform scope when email_verified is absent, while preserving explicit false as blocked.
Aligned admin SPA tenant workspace bootstrap with the same missing-vs-false behavior.
Rebuilt and restarted live acquisition-api on port 8084 with bootstrap platform emails set.
known_gaps: The authenticated browser request must be retried by the operator because the agent does not have the live Auth0 browser token.
operator_message: TMP-058 is complete: configured bootstrap emails now work when email_verified is absent, and the live acquisition-api is healthy on 8084.
risk_notes: An explicit email_verified=false claim still blocks bootstrap platform scope.
The runtime bootstrap email setting is process-level for the current live start; make/system service definitions should carry ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_PLATFORM_EMAILS for future restarts.

validation.output_excerpt: Chrome Headless executed 7 of 7 SUCCESS; TOTAL: 7 SUCCESS
TMP-058 classified vertical_defect_slice; assignment_decision allow; no blocking reasons.
ok true; only known superseded stale ledger warning for TMP-011-repair-1 and TMP-015-repair-1.
build passed after disabling VCS metadata stamping for the worktree
